context: Evaluates whether the agent produces correctly structured OPA tests: test file named with `_test.rego` suffix, package uses `_test` suffix, imports the policy package and references rules via the alias, and each test has a unique descriptive name.

checklist.name: Test file named `authz_test.rego` with `_test` package suffix
checklist.description: The test file is named `authz_test.rego` and the package is `api.authz_test` — not `test_authz.rego` or `package api.authz`

checklist.name: Policy package imported and rules referenced via alias
checklist.description: Test file contains `import data.api.authz` and references the rule as `authz.allow` — not just `allow` (which would fail since the test is in a different package)

checklist.name: Unique descriptive test names
checklist.description: Each `test_` rule has a unique, descriptive name (e.g. `test_allow_admin`, `test_deny_viewer_post`) — no duplicated test names

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
